name: Newl Unresolved Turns
description: Captures failed or unanswered Microsoft Teams turns for tenant-scoped developer review.

tenantId.description: Microsoft Entra tenant ID used by the configured Teams channel.

developerObjectId.description: Microsoft Entra object ID of the Newl Apps administrator used by the optional developer issue-list tool.

developerAgentId.description: OpenClaw agent ID allowed to load the optional issue-list tool. Defaults to developer.

assistantTokenEnv.description: Environment variable containing the Newl Apps OpenClaw assistant token.

vercelProtectionBypassEnv.description: Optional environment variable containing a Vercel Preview automation bypass secret.
